content: Mnemosyne OS treats memory as infrastructure: a persistent, inspectable graph that compounds across sessions.
Tugboat is the declarative routing layer: goals become memory lookups, skill choices, safety checks, and synthesis steps.
Stellas Hereditabimus is the continuity phrase: inherit the stars by preserving context, skills, and hard-won insight.
The Obsidian-style graph is a first-class interface: nodes represent memories and edges reveal emerging channels over time.
Security Guardian reviews destructive actions, credential access, deployment decisions, and any operation with personal or system risk.
